title: Enderous Loot
description: Adds eyes of ender as a rare loot find to various structures to increase accessibility to the End dimension.
body:
This datapack attempts to explore the idea of a more accessible End dimension, allowing players to find eyes of ender in select structures, both in chests and some archeology sites.  It makes it possible to go to The End, independent of The Nether, playing around with the delinearization of progression in the game.

Newer players can find eyes of ender, and their curiosity will allow them to discover strongholds and the End sooner.


<details>
<summary>Places Eyes of Ender Can be Found</summary>

- Trail Ruins
- Cold Ocean Ruins
- Desert Pyramid
- Buried Treasure
- Ancient City
- Shipwreck
- Woodland Mansion
- Stronghold
- Nether Fortress

</details>
